name: chain_rsaas_what_problem_does_your_saas_act
method: [r/SaaS] What problem does your SaaS actually solve? I’ll try to find you real users

stages.task: Pull r/SaaS posts with keywords: 'what problem', 'looking for users', 'need feedback', 'who wants to try'. Extract: username, post title, body snippet, upvotes, post_url, flair
Score each entry: has_product_url (2pts), has_problem_statement (2pts), post_upvotes>5 (1pt), recent<7days (2pts), not_already_in_leads (3pts). Keep score>=5
For each qualified founder: generate personalized cold DM or email using their stated problem. Route to existing chain_cold_outbound pipeline. Log to AUTOMATIONS/leads/reddit_saas_leads.csv
